title: Kinetic modifiers: springs, gravity zones, conveyors

select.note: SELECT: S3.8; deps S3.5 COMPLETED. REQ-153 -> IN_PROGRESS

plan.note: PLAN (dm-0021): fold kinetic modifiers into the systems where they integrate correctly rather than a separate surfaceEffects system — spring + conveyor into PlayerControl (the velocity authority; a post-physics system would be overwritten by control's instant-set), gravity zones into PlayerPhysics (sampled as effective gravity BEFORE the vy update so integration stays correct). Spring: grounded-on-spring -> velocity = launchVelocity (jump impulse still overrides vy if it fires — axiom precedence). Conveyor: grounded-on-conveyor -> vx = moveAxis*runSpeed + surfaceVelocityX. Gravity zone: player center inside zone AABB -> gravityY *= product of gravityScales. Values are per-entity DATA (launchVelocity/surfaceVelocityX/gravityScale), not TUNING. INVARIANT: none touch world.jumpLock — property test asserts jumpLock bit-identical before/after each modifier.

anchor.note: ANCHOR: no new WorldState fields (modifiers are stateless velocity edits from entity data); PlayerControl/PlayerPhysics extended; 180-test suite is the regression gate

implement.note: IMPLEMENT: spring + conveyor folded into PlayerControl (grounded-on-surface velocity edits), gravity zones into PlayerPhysics (effective-gravity sampling before vy update); per-entity data values, no new state (dm-0021)

verify.note: VERIFY: 186/186 (+6: spring upward launch, gravity-zone inversion rises, conveyor composes with walking, THE INVARIANT jumpLock bit-identical across 60 ticks x 3 modifiers + one-jump-retained, spring-launch-then-still-jump-once, all-modifier pipeline replay determinism)

integrate.note: INTEGRATE: PKG player_control + player_physics summaries updated (no new nodes/edges — modifiers read entity data via existing deps), pkg_hash -> s3-b4d8e6; ledger dm-0021 (fold rationale + never-touch-jumpLock invariant)

report.note: REPORT: S3.8 -> COMPLETED; REQ-153 stays IN_PROGRESS until S3.9 phase report (dm-0008)

handoff.note: HANDOFF updated: S3.1-S3.8 complete, resume at S3.9 (verification, closes M1)
